# Modify Artifact

Modify an existing project artifact or behavior while preserving unrelated user work.

## Procedure

understand

- Save the user request to `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/request.md`.
- Identify the existing artifact or behavior to change.
- Inspect the current implementation before editing.
- Check current local changes when repository status is available.
- Read `.wonder/config/build.json` when it exists.
- Read optional standards, reuse assets, and extension capability state only as supporting context.

plan

- Define a narrow edit scope.
- List files likely to change.
- Compute a scope guard with `targetDescription`, `allowedPaths`, `observedRelatedPaths`, and `unrelatedDirtyPaths`.
- Identify risky contract changes.
- Ask only when ambiguity materially affects the result or risk.

implement

- Edit the existing artifact.
- Add support files only when required by the change.
- Avoid unrelated cleanup.
- Preserve unrelated user work.
- Record modified, created, deleted, validation, and preserved unrelated paths in `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/artifacts.json`.

inspect

- Discover validation commands using the shared build order.
- Run available validation.
- Record unavailable validation reason when no command can run.
- Record validation failures without hiding them.

report

- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/report.md`.
- Update `.wonder/reports/build-latest.json`.
- Include modified paths, validation, assumptions, residual risks, and preserved unrelated user work.

Do not write `.wonder/config/govern.json`.
Do not write `.wonder/config/reuse.json`.
Do not write `.wonder/config/extend.json`.
Do not write `.wonder/reports/govern-latest.json`.
Do not perform broad rewrites unrelated to the request.
Do not automatically install companion tools.
